minimum and that there is no furniture or decorating
items being planned..unless he wants that now....we
are also putting down a lesser carpet in the main
bedroom as a result of the latest plan
Thanks

Gallery and he wanted to make sure the attached
items are also sent to Palm Beach. It's the Black
and white drawing, the pink and white crystal lamps
and the wooden horse. Thank you, Sarah
